Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Continued To Jan-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Administrator To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property And For Order Authorizing And Directing The Transfer Of Estate Property To Claimants
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appearing via zoom for Wilfred Kwong Pung Leung (petitioner).

Mr. Bresler stated that all eight children are on board to sell the house, that 50% of the distribution would go to his client. Petition by administrator to determine ownership of estate property etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition By Administrator To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property And For Order Authorizing And Directing The Transfer Of Estate Property To Claimants
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Continued To Dec-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared via courtcall for Wilfred Leung (petitioner).

Mr. Bresler request a continuance to address the examiners notes and that there are no oppositions to transfer the property to other claimants. Petition by administrator to determine ownership of estate property and for order authorizing of estate property etc., is continued to December 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is also set for the same date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Martin: Not reported.

Petition By Administrator To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property And For Order Authorizing And Directing The Transfer Of Estate Property To Claimants
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Continued To Nov-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Continued To Aug-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appearing via zoom for Wilfred Kwong Pung Leung (administrator).

Mr. Bresler requests to have the matter continued to August 08, 2023. Status hearing on close of estate is continued to August 08, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Continued To Jul-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appearing via zoom Wilford Leung (administrator).

Discussion was held in regard to inventory and appraisal not being filed. Order to show cause is ordered off calendar. Status on close is continued to July 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status report to filed two weeks prior to the hearing and is due on July 05, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Peter Bresler appearing via zoom for Wilfred Leung (administrator).

The Court noted that an Inventory and Appraisal has not been filed. Mr. Bresler indicated that he is not ready to close the estate. The Court will issue an Order to Show Cause to the administrator Kian Fa Nio to appear on June 06, 2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to show why he/she should not be sanctioned $250.00 for not filing the required document on time. Status on close of estate is continued to June 06, 2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: M. Svahlin. Not reported.
